title: hieracium ramosissimum subsp. conringiifolium
intro: Hieracium ramosissimum subsp. conringiifolium, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium ramosissimum subsp. conringiifolium include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
